obstacle_groups.label: Upper-right staircase — steps from top-right corner toward center; touches top and right edges
Lower-left staircase — steps from bottom-left corner toward center; touches bottom and left edges
Left mid block — x=0..2, y=6..9, touches left edge
Right mid block — x=12..14, y=11..14, touches right edge
Central obstacle — x=6..8, y=9..10; first obstacle in laser path
